title: Artificial Seawater Medium Preparation
author: Christa Smith
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jvccn2w
materials: Autoclave solutions 1 and 2 and let sit 24-48 hours for gas exchange.
Combine solutions 1 and 2. If a solution has some precipitate, consider filtering solution(s) before or after combining through a 0.2 micron PES membrane.

steps.title: Prepare solution 1
steps.instruction: Prepare solution 1. ASM Solution 1 by Christa Smith

steps.title: Prepare solution 2
steps.instruction: Prepare solution 2. ASM Solution 2 by Christa Smith

steps.title: Add 1 mL of trace element solution
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of trace element solution. L1 Trace Element Solution by Christa Smith

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5 mL of f/2 vitamin solution. f/2 Vitamin Solution by Christa Smith

steps.title: Mix well and store for up...
steps.instruction: Mix well and store for up to 2 weeks at 4 Celsius. Final salt concentration is ~34 ppt.
